title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 353.160 - May accept grants or loans from the United States government
text:
353.160.  May accept grants or loans from the United States government. — Any urban redevelopment corporation may accept grants or loans of money from the government of the United States or any department or agency thereof.
(L. 1943 p. 751 § 23, A.L. 1945 p. 1242 § 15)
